art_highlights: Global Art Market Report 2026 confirms 4% growth to $59.6B for 2025; sector outlook remains 'Cautious Optimism' for 2026
U.S. remains largest market (44% share); APAC growth in Q1 2026 significantly accelerated by 22.7% YoY
Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 upcoming (March 27-29) features 240 galleries and new 'Echoes' sector for recent works
Digital asset/Fine art convergence continues; 51% of high-net-worth collectors engaged with digital art in 2024-2025
Female artist representation reached 50% in primary market galleries during 2025

market_summary.market_sentiment: Positive momentum building into Q2 2026; high-end auction segment in the U.S. remains a key stabilizer
market_summary.key_drivers: High-end auction volume, strong APAC quarterly rebound (Hong Kong focus), and expanding collector interest in digital-hybrid art
market_summary.trend: Increased logistical refocus on local collector bases due to rising global shipping and tax complexities
